summary: Comprehensive testing of retention and engagement features (Shop, Guild, Referral, Profile, NotFoundPage, NotificationBell). Fixed critical route ordering bug in guild API. All 14 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend pages working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Guild API route ordering bug - /{guild_id} route was catching /search and /leaderboard paths
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved static routes (/search, /leaderboard) before dynamic route (/{guild_id})

seed_data_creation: Test user created during testing, guild created via API test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All retention features working correctly. Shop page shows items with categories (Boosters, Quiz Power-ups, Cosmetics, Special). Guild page shows user's guild with members and chat. Referral page shows referral link, stats, milestones, and leaderboard. Profile page shows user info, level, XP, streak, achievements, and stats. 404 page has crypto theme. NotificationBell component visible in navbar for logged-in users.

shop_page.details: Items displayed with prices, categories (Boosters, Quiz Power-ups, Cosmetics, Special), user coin balance shown

guild_page.details: Search guilds, Create guild modal, Guild leaderboard, Guild chat, Members list, Leave guild button

referral_page.details: Referral link and code displayed, stats (Friends Invited, XP Earned, Coins Earned), milestones with rewards, leaderboard

profile_page.details: User info, level, XP progress, streak, achievements (0/12), statistics (Lessons, Quizzes, Exams, Trades, Certificates)

not_found_page.details: Custom 404 page with crypto theme, Go Home/Go Back buttons, fun crypto fact

notification_bell.details: Visible in navbar for logged-in users, dropdown opens on click, shows notifications or 'No notifications yet'

api_shop_items.details: GET /api/v2/shop/items returns all shop items by category

api_referral_stats.details: GET /api/v2/referral/stats/{user_id} returns referral stats with code, link, count, milestones

api_guild_leaderboard.details: GET /api/v2/guild/leaderboard returns guild leaderboard (fixed route ordering bug)

api_notifications.details: GET /api/v2/notifications/{user_id} returns user notifications and unread count

rca_of_issue.issue: Guild API /search and /leaderboard endpoints returning 'Guild not found' error
rca_of_issue.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - the dynamic route /{guild_id} was defined before static routes /search and /leaderboard, causing 'search' and 'leaderboard' to be matched as guild_id values
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Reordered routes in /app/backend/routes/community.py to place static routes (/search, /leaderboard) before the dynamic route (/{guild_id})
rca_of_issue.verification: All guild API tests now pass
